summary: This video is an institutional/promotional production from University of Nevada Urology featuring Dr. Matthew C. McCormack. It contains multiple scenes: opening logo sequences, interview/talking-head segments with the physician in clinic and office settings, patient consultation scenes, and closing branding/website information. No FLS task performance is visible. The video is educational/promotional in nature with overlays, title cards, and professional production quality typical of medical institution marketing materials.
fls_task_content: None — no FLS trainer, instruments, or task performance visible
reason_not_scored: Video contains no FLS MISTELS task performance. This is institutional/promotional content featuring a urologist, not a timed laparoscopic skills assessment. No trainer equipment, no surgical instruments in use, no task-specific objectives observed.
notes: Per rubric classification, this video is 'instructional' in the sense of being educational/promotional material, not a scored performance or expert demonstration of an FLS task. No assessment is appropriate.
